{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Primary Query Summary · bdsnode{% endblock %} {% block nav_primary_query_summary %}active{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Primary Query Summary

Extractive TextRank summary over primary records matching a vector query

v2/summary_for_query
Summarising…
How it works: The query is embedded with the same vector model used for telemetry search. Matching primary records are pulled from across all shards (default lookback 365 days), numeric measurements are skipped, and the remaining text bodies — read from data["value"] or data["raw"] — are ranked by TextRank into a single focused summary.
{% if q.is_empty() %}
Enter a query above and click Summarise to build a query-focused summary.

Loading summary…
{% endif %}
